testcase.name: test_upload_png_and_download
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_society_invoice_payment.py:115: in test_upload_png_and_download assert p.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_empty_string_clears_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_society_invoice_payment.py:87: in test_empty_string_clears_field assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_society_returns_new_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing key logo_file_id in society response assert 'logo_file_id' in {'id': 'singleton', 'name': 'Green Valley Residency', 'address': 'Sector 5, Old Airport Road', 'city': 'Bengaluru', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_society_invoice_payment.py:55: in test_get_society_returns_new_fields assert key in data, f"Missing key {key} in society response" E AssertionError: Missing key logo_file_id in society response E assert 'logo_file_id' in {'id': 'singleton', 'name': 'Green Valley Residency', 'address': 'Sector 5, Old Airport Road', 'city': 'Bengaluru', ...}
